prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 位次已恢复至2840名的历史正常区间、2026年扩招5人（+5.7%）对竞争略有加剧、物理类考生总数减少约3.4%缓解竞争、学校软科排名升至第50名提升吸引力、信息通信与计算机 类专业持续高热等因素，在，考虑考生减少带来的竞争缓解，预测2026年最低位次约2887名，较2025年2840名小幅后移约47名。区间2387–3387 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 2963, 2464, 6961 (Hongfu Campus), 6396 (Hongfu Campus), and 2840 respectively. From 2021 to 2022, it stabilized in the 2500–3000 range. In 2023–2024, due to enrollment at Hongfu Campus, it significantly shifted back to 6000–7000. In 2025, it recovered to 2840, returning to the historical normal range. Fluctuations have been significant in recent two years, with a baseline of about 2840 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi: 82 in 2021, 81 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 88 in 2024, 88 in 2025, and 93 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 5 students (+5.7%), a moderate expansion that somewhat intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, a top institution in the field of information and communication. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 50th (60th in 2025, 63rd in 2024), with rankings continuously rising and entering the top 50 for the first time, further enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and reputation. The university was not listed in the reputation data from 2021 to 2026, indicating no significant negative public opinion events, with overall reputation stable. Douyin heat total ranking 64th (evaluation 'average'), 2023 annual ranking 33rd (evaluation 'relatively hot'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, no signs of excessive application heat. Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, Optical Engineering A-. A total of 6 disciplines rated A- or above, among which information communication and computer science are both highly popular fields in current society.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer and Electronic Information/Communication majors have been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with extremely high social attention. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight decline in total examinees, easing competition slightly. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Shanxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi for Physics Category is relatively large (88 in 2025), making it an important source of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has recovered to the historical normal range of 2840, the 2026 expansion of 5 students (+5.7%) slightly intensifies competition, the decrease in Physics Category examinees by about 3.4% eases competition, the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 50th enhances attractiveness, and the continued high popularity of information communication and computer majors, taking into account the eased competition from the decrease in examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2887, a slight backward shift of about 47 places from 2840 in 2025. Range: 2387–3387.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information Class (Yuan Class) (Communication Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering)
- Computer Class (Yuan Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Embodied Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Communication Engineering (Major Enrollment)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Class (Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Major Enrollment)
- Automation Class (Intelligent Robots)
- Software Engineering
- Cyberspace Security (Major Enrollment)
- Intelligent Interaction Design.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2387–3387, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 Yuan Class majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2400), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 Yuan Class majors. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 2800), target Tier 2 Communication Engineering and Computer Class as core goals. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (above 3300), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1334, 1292, 1271, 1669, and 1216 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized in the range of 1270–1340. In 2024, due to changes in statistical methods, it shifted to 1669. In 2025, it recovered to 1216, the best in recent years. Overall, there is a slight forward trend, with a baseline of about 1216 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for history category in Shanxi Province: 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 13 in 2025, and 13 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with a Soft Science ranking rising to 50th in 2026. Although it is known for science and engineering, the 211 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates. Its reputation is stable, with no negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average; liberal arts majors are not the main focus of the university's publicity, so attention is limited. The university's liberal arts discipline evaluation data is limited; the main liberal arts enrollment majors include Law (joint degree with China University of Political Science and Law), Network and New Media, Public Administration, and English. Among them, the joint law degree program has high appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there are approximately 63,113 history category candidates in Shanxi Province, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025, greatly reducing competition. The social popularity of liberal arts majors is generally stable. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for liberal arts candidates in Shanxi, but the university's liberal arts majors are small in scale (only 4 majors), with a stable enrollment of 13 students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking of 1216 is already at the best historical level, the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, the total number of history category candidates has significantly decreased by about 25.6%, greatly easing competition, and the university's rising ranking enhances overall appeal, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1186, moving forward by about 30 places from 1216 in 2025. The range is 973–1399.

- Network and New Media.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1000), focus on reaching for the Law joint degree program. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 1200), prioritize Network and New Media. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (above 1300), it is recommended to use English as a safety major.
